game.title: Musculus
game.short_text: Manipulate mice in the name of science, in a cute science puzzle game.

details.title: Musculus
details.description:
🐀 Musculas is a puzzle game created for Wowie Jam #3, hosted by Jonas Tyroller. The game is puzzle platformer where you control mice and rats through logistic problems, where every time you restart the level, the previous rat continues along its path remembering what you did last time - with several bumps along the way. The game was made in three days, using Gamemaker Studio 1.4.
The game features time trial medals for extra completion, but can be played at any pace. Controlling one mouse at a time sounds easy enough, but the mistakes of your past will always reveal themselves and cause all kinds of shenanigans.
🐭
--------------------------------------------------------------
Controls:
W - Jump
A - Move Left
D - Move Right
E - Spawn Mouse
Q - Spawn Rat
R - Reset Stage
ESC - Quit / Go Back
--------------------------------------------------------------

Credits: 
🐀 Stepford (Programmer / Artist)
🐀 SlickRamen (Programmer / Artist)
🐀 RyanAvx (Music)
🐀 Sound Effects came from various free resource websites, and are legally free to use.

game.title: Bad Luck Cat
game.short_text: What's the worst that can happen?

details.title: Bad Luck Cat
details.description:
ABOUT
BLC is a road crossing game in which you play as a black cat. Unlike the traditional road crossing games, crossing the road safely will not score you any points!
Created in 3 days for Wowie Jam 3.0. The topic was: "FAILURE IS PROGRESS: Let's mess with the concepts of winning and losing".

HOW TO PLAY
Move: arrow keys
You have one minute to create as much chaos as possible. Make cars crash into eachother, and into other objects!
CREDITS
shadowsora - programming, music
bluchu - art

Assets used:
SFX: 8-Bit Sound Effects [100+ SFX] by Beep Yeah!

details.title: Lichbolt the Uncareful
details.description:
Meet Lichbolt:
An undead mage on a quest to become the strongest wizard alive (or dead idk).
However his expeditions are known to be doomed by failure and misfortune, often due to his clumsy behavior.  
Follow him through the depths of the deadliest dungeon any adventurer has ever set foot to. 
Using his signature move "Ghost-form", he can not only avoid traps and save his life, but also use the extended freedom of movement of a floating spirit to his advantage.
This turns his tendency to rush skull-first through any danger, which would under normal circumstances kill him,  into his best chance to beat the dungeon and find whatever he is looking for.
Just, please make sure he doesn't jump into a puddle of holy water. 
He is allergic to it.

game.title: Overlap
game.short_text: Your past lives overlap in one place. Can you use them to your advantage?

details.title: Overlap
details.description:
I recommend downloading the desktop version for better performance
Overlap is a top down shooter inspired by the theme: "failure is progress", made in 3 days  for the Wowie Jam 3.0!
Each death spawns a ghost that repeats everything you did before you died. Be careful, though! If you die too many times, you'll have to start over. In order to win, you'll need help of all five ghosts you can spawn.
Manage your deaths wisely and overcome the challenge!
CONTROLS
WASD / Arrow keys - Movement
LMB - Fire a projectile. You can hold the button to keep shooting.
P - Pause
TOOLS USED

Engine - Unity 2020.2.2f1
Graphics - Aseprite
Sound effects - sfxr

game.title: Death Percent [Project 2021-3]
game.short_text: In this platformer, death is not the end. Levels can only be finished once your character has perished.

details.title: Death Percent [Project 2021-3]
details.description:
In this platformer, death is not the end. Levels can only be finished once your character has perished. Can you get the fasted time in all 12 levels in order to unlock the ending?
Tips:

Although you may be able to move through walls, you move much slower as a Ghost.
Music or sounds annoying you? You can adjust their levels in the settings menu!
Controls:

Movement: WASD or Arrow Keys
Jump (human only): W, up or space bar
Profile Update (4/27/23) Contains:
New Profile SystemNew Main Menu OptionsGhost Movement Fix
What is Project 2021?
Over the course of this year, I am trying to tell a story between all of my games. While you do not need to play any prior or following games to enjoy this, the lore does build. Can you piece together the story that is being told?
Canon Games (2021):

Out Of Time
Armor Of God
Death Percent
Rouge Royale
A Name Is Earned
Last Man Standing
Joining Forces
Second Son
Death Percent 2
Journey to Hell
A Drunk Thief Returns
From the Ashes

Canon Games (Post-Challenge):

On Thin Ice
Static Lifeline
In The Walls
Against All Odds 
Back From The Brink
You Picked The Wrong Castle
Expedition of Extinction16 Bit Arcade
Built To Scale Mountains

Older Updates:
Lore Update (3/17/21) Contains:
Normal ending
Secret ending
Main Menu AnimationsPost-Jam Fixes (3/12/21):Timer starts on player moving instead of automaticallyWorld Record Counter is now semi-transparentWall Jump glitch has been patchedLevel 11 will no longer let the player up the tunnelNo more jumping off of spawnNo more dying and respawning as a ghostWall clip in level 12 has been fixed
Other:

game.title: Snakefice
game.short_text: Snakefice it's a game about sacrifice... strategic sacrifice

details.title: Snakefice
details.description:
Snakefice it's a game about sacrifice... strategic sacrifice.
You should use your old body as blocks to traverse the level and reach the portal.
I hope you had fun playing it.

CONTROLS:
- Use arrow keys to move

Designer note: This concept has a huge design space and just with the spikes and blocks that are in the game is possible to create super interesting levels... BUT, it's surprisingly hard and time-consuming to design this kinda puzzle. I feel that the game could be better in the sense that there are so many possibilities even with so simple elements, unfortunately, I was very short on time and couldn't do a better job in the level design.

------------------------------------------------

game.title: A Date with Death
game.short_text: Will you save humanity, or will you just... give up?

details.title: A Date with Death
details.description:
You are the last member of the human army, if you fall, humanity shall perish.
So you can't die.
Seriously you can't.
Stop it.

=========== CONTROLS ===========
WASD to move.Mouse to aim and Left mouse button to shootLeft Shift to sprint.
(Also if you think the game is very hard, consider saying no when Death asks to revive you ^_^ )
=========== ABOUT ==============
Short game ~5 minutes.
The game is a mix of top down shooter and a very weird dating sim where you can charm Death by staying with him.
Multiple endings.
Made for Wowie Jam 3.0
"Failure is progress" > The more you fail the easier the game gets. (Also you can progress the relationship with Death)"Let's mess with the concepts of winning and losing" > Both winning and losing have their own gameplay loops, will you succeed first try on purposely off yourself to be with Death?
================================

game.title: EMERGENCY PROTOCOL
game.short_text: Crash, and Switch your control scheme!

details.title: EMERGENCY PROTOCOL
details.description:
You are a in a spacecraft on a crash course to a distant planet. Luckily, your ship has many Emergency Protocols, which activate after each other, and each have unique controls from one another. Unluckily, only your last remaining Protocol will work on the planet. All others fail. 
You need to destroy each one, one after another, until you reach the end, where you can just cruise to safety. And also you have a limited time to do this until your ship crashes.
Made for the WOWIE game jam 3.0, the theme being "Failure is progress" The game fits the theme as, the more you fail, the more progress you make towards your final form.
This game was made with HTML5 and typescript. There are no sprites used, only circles, rectangles and triangles. Idk why I limited myself this way but I think it worked out.
All code, music, "art" and sound effects were made during the jam.

game.title: Blue Blob
game.short_text: Inspired by Pacman. Failing reduces the number of coins to be collected in your next try.

details.title: Blue Blob
details.description:
BLUE BLOB
When you fail, the number of coins that need to be collected in the next try is reduced by one (up to a limit of 10).
Collecting more coins causes more enemies to spawn. More and more Red Blobs begin to surround Blue Blob as you progress through the level. Inspired by Pacman.
How to PlayGoal: Collect all coinsControls: Blue Blob will follow your mouse cursor.
Known bugs/issues:
The full screen button may not work on some browsers. However, it seems to work fine on Google Chrome.The game doesn't seem to load in an Incognito window.

Designed and developed by Vitesh Dav Soni

game.title: A spell to live for
game.short_text: A platformer where you have to go home, even if you have to die, and die, and die again on the way.

details.title: A spell to live for
details.description:
In an unknown land, in a distant placeLived a wizard, peace and content in soul
Surrounded by bees, trees, lady nature's graceSuch a scenery called for a sweet little stroll

In their quest for exploration, wonderTheir stomach suddenly called for hunger
The forest was filled with great ingredients"Exploring further should be convenient!"

With an empty belly and a wavering mindOur hero was now lost for certain
With nothing in hand, and their home to findThe Wizard was ready ! Let's open this curtain...



In this platformer, you can go left, right, and jump
Use your keyboard to play
A = to go left
D = to go right
Space = to jump
Spam space  = to climb the big plant
Hold middle mouse button = place a respawn
The water might be useful to grow a seed...

You wont be able to get to your cosy home without dying, use your middleclick to create a sigil so you can come back safely to life.


TechDivers : Code
FrancisRave : Music/SFX & Text
Tori: Art
This game was made during the Wovie game jam 3.0 - from 26.02 to 01.03The theme was : Failure is progress

game.title: Spotlight
game.short_text: Die. Remember. Repeat.

details.title: Spotlight
details.description:
Die. Remember. Repeat.
This game was made during the Wowie! Game Jam 3.0. So expect minor or major bugs here and there but the game should be fully playable from start to end.
Note for WebGL version
If you're experiencing input lag or a low framerate, please checkout the native builds below because these are better in general. If you're under macOS you could use Wine to start the Windows build.

Game idea
Since the topic of the jam is Failure is progress we decided to make a game where you will die but learn from your mistakes to proceed in the levels.
Team

Felix Schaar - Level Design, Sounds, UI
Nicolas Klier - Level Design, Programming, Animations

game.title: Blood Magic
game.short_text: Shooter with interesting death mechanic

details.title: Blood Magic
details.description:
Blood magic is a Wowie 2021 game jam game. The theme of the jam was: FAILURE IS PROGRESS.You are cast out Blood Magician that almost lost all of his power. Now you are looking for revenge and a way to restore the power you lost. Go through Blood Mage's stronghold and fight your way to meet the grandmaster and kill him to absorb his blood and be full again.Your blood is your main resource: Health, Ammunition, Ability usage. When you use all your blood you will die. But don't worry when you will die you will leave your sack of blood behind and be reincarnated at the beginning. Now your blood sack is your refill for your precious blood. Use it wisely as placement of your death is crucial.Controls:WASD/Left Stick - MovementSPACEBAR/A - Jump
LEFT SHIFT/ LEFT BUMPED - Dash
R/B -  Remove Your bodies and gain instant refill of blood (but loose bodies on level)
ESC/Start - Menu controls
Left Mouse Button/ Right Bumper - Shoot

The game can be played with a controller or mouse and keyboard. Menus need to be operated by a mouse.

Have fun and leave a comment.

ASSET USED:
HolyShift - Water Shader (UnityAssetStore)
Horror Sfx (UnityAssetStore)
PolygonKnights (UnityAssetStore)
PolygonPrototype (UnityAssetStore)
PSXEffects (UnityAssetStore)
Ultimate Game Music Collection (UnityAssetStore)
Game Icon Bundle from Humble Bundle by REXARD

game.short_text: Wreak havoc in this cat puzzle-adventure by doing what you're not supposed to

details.title: Kitty Kitty Bang Bang
details.description:
Wreak havoc in this cat puzzle-adventure, created for Wowie Jam 3.0 with the theme 'Failure is progress'. Break bottles, start fires, destroy houses and... shoot a cannon? This cat is about to start a revolution! It's Stanley Parable meets Goose Game... but with a superior animal.
Made in way less than 48h with Unity 2020.2 and Game Creator by gypynkt (Sebastian Graetz), with original music by Tunglith. This was the first time trying myself on an animal character controller, and having a more complex quest system and environment interaction. I had to cut a level in the end because I ran out of time, it might come in the future.
WASD to move, E to interact, SPACE to jump, left SHIFT to run and jump further, ESC to pause menu.

game.title: Android Negotiator
game.short_text: You're the best damn android negotiator there is, now stop that bomber!

details.title: Android Negotiator
details.description:
Android Negotiator
You're the best damn android negotiator there is and you are about to face your toughest test.  You have 5 android negotiating robots at your disposal and face a crazy android hell-bent on blowing up a building. You must use your androids to unlock clues through dialogue that will help you disarm the bomb.  Every time you fail you'll understand a little more of the situation.  This game was influenced by Detroit Become Human from Quantic Games. You can watch my devlog on how I made the game on my YouTube channel. 
Made for the Wowie Game Jam 3.0, Theme: Failure is Progress.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: Xanderwood

details.title: Cult Nightmare
details.description:
*This Game Contains Jumpscare*
Cult nightmare
Once upon a time, there was a girl called "Nina". One day, she goes to a scout camp. She felt bored so much, so she's going around the forest. In the forest, she got kidnapped by a "reaper". The reaper is a member of a demon cult that needs a victim for its cult ritual. Nina was the victim, she got trapped in a strange house and she only has 7 days to escape before the day of the ritual start.
How the game fit the theme "Failure is Progress"By Failing to escape, you will get a weird dream that can help you to figure out how to escape.Clue: Every time you get caught you will see a dream about the reaper when he stopped moving he actually hiding something in there and you must go there to find out what he actually hiding.

game.title: Don't Get The Job
game.short_text: Interview at The Forum

details.title: Don't Get The Job
details.description:
Oh no!
Your recruiter has accidentally set up an interview with some crazy people at a company called The Forum! 
Your task is simple, just go through the motions and whatever you do, DON'T get the job. But as it turns out, that's a bit harder than you might've originally thought.
This game was made in 3 days for the Wowie 3.0 game jam, we hope you enjoy it! And if you wanna know more about The Forum, check out another game we're working on; Glitcheon!
This game has been updated
To play the original game jam version, made for Wowie Jam 3.0, download the jam version build. The Webgl version has been updated with fixes, new content and improved balancing.
Soundtrack:
https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=https%3A//api.soundcloud.com/playlists/1219525297&color=%231a8cff&auto_play=false&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false&show_teaser=true&visual=true
Credits: 
River Forge Games: Coding and writing
Yän: 2D assets and audio
Bonicle: 3D models and animations
Special thanks to Moumekie for helping solve some problems with the interviewer model!

game.title: GranniesGrumble
game.short_text: Play as a peacemaker between three disgruntled and foul-mouthed island residents.

details.title: GranniesGrumble
details.description:
Submission for the Wowie 3.0 Jam!!!! The theme was Failure is Progress.
Play as a peacemaker between three disgruntled and foul-mouthed island residents. Try as you might to unite them, whatever you do seems to anger them, but perhaps a common enemy is what they need to bring them together? Play the game and find out how to help them the best or worst.
Our interpretation of the theme is that you can seemingly fail to unify the community but that is what actually brings them together.
WARNING: explicit language and themes rated for 18+Art and Level Design by Wilhelm PfitzNarrative, Development and Programming by Xavier PooleSound design, Voice edits and Music by Daniel Poole
Controls: WASD to control walking directional, SHIFT to sprint, ENTER to interact with the characters and the world and ESC to close the game.

game.title: MAKE THEM FAIL!
game.short_text: A small game amount BUTTON MASHING and failure...

details.title: MAKE THEM FAIL!
details.description:
STORY:
YOU ARE ABOUT TO FAIL A TEST.
NO ONE ELSE MUST BE ALLOWED TO PASS.
YELL AT THE OTHER STUDENTS. BERATE THEM. DISTRACT THEM.
MAKE THEM FAIL.

CONTROLS:
WASD - Move
RMB / LMB / J / K / L - Yell (MASH THESE TO SUCCEED)

GAMEPLAY:
Your goal is to get all of the students in the room to fail by yelling at them until they give up!
Don't get caught by teachers or they'll apprehend you! 
Students will slowly complete their tests and pass. You need to be fast enough to make them fail before that happens!
Have fun!

game.title: Remembering The Good Times
game.short_text: Grandpa tries to tell his grandson bedtime stories, but can't remember exactly what happened

details.title: Remembering The Good Times
details.description:
Controls
Left click / Space - Advance dialog
M - Toggle mute
A/D - Move left/right in 2nd and 3rd stories
J - Attack in 2nd and 3rd stories
K - Block in 2nd story
About
This game was made in 72 hours for the Wowie 3 game jam. The theme was "Failure is Progress". In this game, failing to tell the stories in the correct order will let you know how many events happened in the order you gave and how many events are in the wrong order.
How to Play
Grandpa will tell 3 stories. In each story, there are 6 events you can perform. It's your job to find out in which order 4 of these events took place. After you select 4 events (depending on the story, you'll do this differently), a notification will tell you how many of those events are in the right order and how many are in the wrong order. If you've ever played Mastermind, the board game, it's basically that. Be aware that since there are 6 possible events, there are at least 2 that didn't happen and in some stories, some events may be repeated.
Help! My game is stuck at the start with a kid on a bed
Try clicking on the game to bring it into focus and wait for sounds to start happening. If it still doesn't work, press 2 to skip to the next scene or use a different browser that handles sound better like Chrome.
Cheats
Pressing 1-7 while watching the intro will jump to that scene. 2 is the 1st story, 4 is the 2nd story, and 6 is the 3rd story.
Walkthrough (SPOILERS)
1st story - Orange, Red, Blue, Yellow (compliment hat, start raining, beckon closer, almost killed)
2nd story - Red, Red, Blue, Green (block a hit, block a hit, hit the bully while he isn't blocking, leave to the left)
3rd story - Red, Green, Yellow, Orange (kill red, kill green, kill yellow, die)
Credits
(Most of the) Sounds - PMSFX
Fonts - The Artisan Marker , Lilita One
Everything else - Vykri (me)

details.title: When I Die
details.description:
ATTENTION:At first I uploaded wrong version, so the first dialog in game was missing, now it's fixed.STORY:Story of Mighty Hero on a quest to The Dungeon. Events take an ugly turn when the first goblin in the hallway strikes a critical hit and kills YOU. Guided by a mysterious voice, Mighty Hero uses his newly obtained abilities as a ghost to possess the souls of the monster's enemies and navigate through all the levels. game.title: The Pain Train of Time
game.short_text: Die to Progress through the Train!

details.title: The Pain Train of Time
details.description:
Noticing a town, destroyed by a runaway train, and being the only Time-Traveling Cowboy in the Wild West, you decide to send yourself back in time to stop the train from causing mass destruction.
Unfortunately, the train is full of dangerous things that could kill you. Luckily, you're, y'know, a time-traveler! Whenever you receive a fatal blow, your time-machine will automatically create a copy of you to feel the pain and send the real you back in time to safety. You'll have to use the failures of your past self to make progress!

How To Play:
Your objective is to get through all ten stages of the train. Dying in different ways can have different effects:
Pitfall - Your soul will rise up into the sky, which you can use as a platform!
Spikes - Your (copy of your) body will fly into the air and bounce off of other spikes.
Bullet - Your past self will be sent flying in a straight direction.
Any form of yourself can activate on/off switches.

Controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD - Move
Space / Z - Jump
R - Restart Level
Escape - Menu

Credits:
Graphics & Music - MeSounds - Respawn sound was remixed from freesound.orgFont - StudebakerNFCreated in around 2 days for Wowie Jam 3.0!

game.short_text: You will die. Your children will learn from it.

details.title: Apex
details.description:
**Gameplay Hints at Bottom (Spoilers)**
Description:
You are small. You are weak. You are pitiful. But your children don't have to be.
Your genetic code is adaptable. If you die to a hazard, your next of kin will be equipped to deal with it. Adapt, evolve, and become an apex predator.
Controls:
WASD/Arrow keys: Move
Space/Up: Jump (unlockable)
Left Click: Attack (unlockable)

Made By:
@michael-grieshofer - Coding and menu art
@nickitus - Sound design and music
@drmanatee - Environment and character designs

Made in 3 days for the Wowie Jam with a theme of "Failure is Progress"

Gameplay Hints:
- you need the swimming upgrade to beat the apex predator
- To beat the game, you need to defeat the apex predator which is to the right of your initial spawn point
- You unlock gliding by taking fall damage

game.title: Test Chamber Evaluator
game.short_text: Try to brick the Test Chambers to help Shutter Inovations Ltd.

details.title: Test Chamber Evaluator
details.description:
Important:
Godot's HTML export is pretty broken, so you will need to download the game as an executabe to get the correct / good graphics
This is my submission for the Wowie game jam. (Also my first game jam ever)
Hello Scientists,
at Shutter Inovations Ltd. we are always working hard to create new amazing inovations!
But those inovations need intense testing. Thus we created lots of  Testchambers where our subjects will thoroughly evaluate our new products.
Sometimes our designers fail to create fail-safe Testchambers though. Subjects have found them self to brick the chambers making them impossible to solve
It will be your job to find all ways to break our chambers so our testing can continue without any problems! Basicaly try to get rid of all cubes.
The only qualifactions for this job are that you can remember these controls:
- Use "E" to interact / pickup objects- Use "Mouse 1" to throw objects- Use "Tab" to see your progress
Keep On Inovating
Yours truly,Cavern JohnsonEDIT: Added an upadted version, which fixed some major bugs where the game wouldn't detect a softlock/brick.

game.title: I Won't Let You Fail
game.short_text: A benevolent AI won't let any harm come to you. Can you still manage to escape?

details.title: I Won't Let You Fail
details.description:
About the Game
I Won't Let You Fail my entry into the Wowie Jam 3.0. The theme was Failure is Progress: Let's mess with the concepts of winning and losing.
In this game you are a blob within a sminulation. SEPIA, an AI guardian is watching over you and caring for you. Don't worry, they won't let any harm come to you. Too bad that's the only way to escape this maddening simulation.
Controls
Left: A / Left ArrowRight: D / Right ArrowJump: W / Up Arrow / Space
Credits
Most of this game was created by me within a weekend, including game design, programming, and most of the art. However, i would not have been able to complete this without some external assets:
Graphics
 This includes some UI elements, and all cyan colored platform tiles.
1-Bit Platformer Pack by Kenney1-Bit Pack by Kenney
Audio
Retro Music Pack by JDBArtistUltimate Sound FX Bundle by Sidearm Studios
Font
Source Code Pro by Paul D. Hunt
Shaders
CTR Shader by HiulitDissolve Shader by GDQuest

resultData.title: How Not To Summon A Reaper

game.title: How Not To Summon A Reaper

details.title: How Not To Summon A Reaper
details.description:
Some dumb reaper broke his scythe when he missed your face. You decide to team up to gain more power back, by getting killed by different types of enemies to gain powers.  Will you let the shifty reaper corrupt you in the end?
Gameplay walkthrough spoilers: 
Get killed by every type of slime to unlock new abilities. The green and red can stack once. Get killed by every Stealth Slime on the map to unlock the boss door. 
There are 2 different endings depending on what you do in the final battle.
Credits:
Made by me, some sound assets taken from the wowie asset pack
https://jonas-tyroller.itch.io/wowie-pack
Music:
https://dova-s.jp/bgm/play12401.html
https://dova-s.jp/bgm/play10407.htmPost Jam Bug Fixes: Fixed a bug where you could skip fighting the final boss by leaving and reentering after he kills you.Modified the bad ending text to make it clearer that there is a different ending.
